title: No You Don't
description: Small Datapack I made for restricting access to the nether and the end!
body:
![No You Don't Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/571ae4001a20d97478c7acb3bc346b1f3d80a1bb.png)

## Small Datapack I made for restricting access to the nether and the end!
### Current Features

<details>
<summary>Config</summary>

Type 
```
/function no_you_dont:config
```
To configure the datapack.

Setting the Unlock Time to -10 or lower permanently disables that dimension!

![Config Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/264a0b0893c73eff9d8b4c0f24552f11114e9a67.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Change Difficulty</summary>

Changes Difficulty based on what dimensions have been unlocked.


</details>

---
